'''鈭歞h-v-th''' ('''dhavatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanoindent|nanoindent]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanoindent|nanoindent]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-v-th
|-
! Lemma
| dhavatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhavathithi|dhavathithi]] || [[word:dhavathiji|dhavathiji]] || [[word:dhavathishi|dhavathishi]] || [[word:dhavathi|dhavathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavathuthuth|dhavathuthuth]] || [[word:dhavathujuj|dhavathujuj]] || [[word:dhavathushush|dhavathushush]] || [[word:dhavath|dhavath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavathuthu|dhavathuthu]] || [[word:dhavathuju|dhavathuju]] || [[word:dhavathushu|dhavathushu]] || [[word:dhavathu|dhavathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavathufuth|dhavathufuth]] || [[word:dhavathufuj|dhavathufuj]] || [[word:dhavathufush|dhavathufush]] || [[word:dhavathuf|dhavathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhavathethe|dhavathethe]] || [[word:dhavatheje|dhavatheje]] || [[word:dhavatheshe|dhavatheshe]] || [[word:dhavathe|dhavathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavathothoth|dhavathothoth]] || [[word:dhavathojoj|dhavathojoj]] || [[word:dhavathoshosh|dhavathoshosh]] || [[word:dhavath|dhavath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavathotho|dhavathotho]] || [[word:dhavathojo|dhavathojo]] || [[word:dhavathosho|dhavathosho]] || [[word:dhavatho|dhavatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavathofoth|dhavathofoth]] || [[word:dhavathofoj|dhavathofoj]] || [[word:dhavathofosh|dhavathofosh]] || [[word:dhavathof|dhavathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhavath忙th忙|dhavath忙th忙]] || [[word:dhavath忙j忙|dhavath忙j忙]] || [[word:dhavath忙sh忙|dhavath忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhavath忙|dhavath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavathathath|dhavathathath]] || [[word:dhavathajaj|dhavathajaj]] || [[word:dhavathashash|dhavathashash]] || [[word:dhavath|dhavath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavathatha|dhavathatha]] || [[word:dhavathaja|dhavathaja]] || [[word:dhavathasha|dhavathasha]] || [[word:dhavatha|dhavatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavathafath|dhavathafath]] || [[word:dhavathafaj|dhavathafaj]] || [[word:dhavathafash|dhavathafash]] || [[word:dhavathaf|dhavathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhavathasha|dhavathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhavathasha|godhavathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhavathasha|gokidhavathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhavathn眉sha|dhavathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhavathnkn眉sha|godhavathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhavathn眉sha|gokidhavathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhavathsh毛sha|dhavathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhavathnksh毛sha|godhavathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhavathsh毛sha|gokidhavathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhavathrosha|dhavathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhavathnkrosha|godhavathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhavathrosha|gokidhavathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhavathmusha|dhavathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhavathnkmusha|godhavathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhavathmusha|gokidhavathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhavathsherasha|dhavathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhavathnksherasha|godhavathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhavathsherasha|gokidhavathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhavathngasha|dhavathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhavathnkngasha|godhavathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhavathngasha|gokidhavathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhavathyasha|dhavathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhavathnkyasha|godhavathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhavathyasha|gokidhavathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhavathyamasha|dhavathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhavathnkyamasha|godhavathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhavathyamasha|gokidhavathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhavathn眉sh毛sha|dhavathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhavathnkn眉sh毛sha|godhavathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhavathn眉sh毛sha|gokidhavathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhavathn眉rosha|dhavathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhavathnkn眉rosha|godhavathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhavathn眉rosha|gokidhavathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhavathn眉musha|dhavathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhavathnkn眉musha|godhavathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhavathn眉musha|gokidhavathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhavathsh毛n眉sha|dhavathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhavathnksh毛n眉sha|godhavathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhavathsh毛n眉sha|gokidhavathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhavathsh毛rosha|dhavathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhavathnksh毛rosha|godhavathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhavathsh毛rosha|gokidhavathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhavathsh毛musha|dhavathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhavathnksh毛musha|godhavathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhavathsh毛musha|gokidhavathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhavathron眉sha|dhavathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhavathnkron眉sha|godhavathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhavathron眉sha|gokidhavathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhavathrosh毛sha|dhavathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhavathnkrosh毛sha|godhavathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhavathrosh毛sha|gokidhavathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhavathromusha|dhavathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhavathnkromusha|godhavathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhavathromusha|gokidhavathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhavathmun眉sha|dhavathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhavathnkmun眉sha|godhavathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhavathmun眉sha|gokidhavathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhavathmush毛sha|dhavathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhavathnkmush毛sha|godhavathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhavathmush毛sha|gokidhavathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhavathmurosha|dhavathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhavathnkmurosha|godhavathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhavathmurosha|gokidhavathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhavath|dhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙v忙th|dh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhavath|hodhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙v忙th|hodh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhavath|hohodhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙v忙th|hohodh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhavath|n眉dhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙v忙th|n眉dh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhavath|n眉n眉dhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙v忙th|n眉n眉dh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhavath|n茂dhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙v忙th|n茂dh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhavath|n茂n茂dhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙v忙th|n茂n茂dh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhavath|ludhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙v忙th|ludh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhavath|luludhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙v忙th|luludh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhavath|lidhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙v忙th|lidh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhavath|lilidhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙v忙th|lilidh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhavath|kodhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙v忙th|kodh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhavath|kokodhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙v忙th|kokodh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhavath|kedhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙v忙th|kedh忙v忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhavath|kekedhavath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙v忙th|kekedh忙v忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
